headline: Why S&P Global (SPGI) Is Refocusing Around Its Core Data and Ratings Moat
summary: S&P Global Inc. (NYSE:SPGI) is one of the best stocks to buy with wide moats. The latest moat-relevant update came on May 7, 2026, when S&P Global Inc. (NYSE:SPGI) filed the Form 10 registration statement for the planned separation of its Mobility division into an independent public company, Mobility Global Inc. The company said it […]

headline: Louis Navellier sends powerful message on AI FOMO trade, economy
summary: The fear of missing out, or FOMO, has hit a new high. On May 7, $2.6 trillion of S&P call options were bought, the most ever in one day, driving prices higher. Some market pundits say we are in a bubble, while others say we are still in the early innings of AI productivity gains. The ...
